title: Currency conversion and decimal shift in CDS
description: Currency conversion and decimal shift in CDS. Key topics: CURRENCY_CONVERSION converts amounts between currencies using. DECIMAL_SHIFT adjusts decimal places based on currency (e.g. JPY has 0 decimals). Both require @Semantics.amount.currencyCode annotation on the result.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:

◆DECIMAL_SHIFT adjusts decimal places based on currency (e.g. JPY has 0 decimals)
◆Both require @Semantics.amount.currencyCode annotation on the result
◆Key parameters for CURRENCY_CONVERSION:

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆CURRENCY_CONVERSION converts amounts between currencies using
◆DECIMAL_SHIFT adjusts decimal places based on currency (e.g. JPY has 0 decimals)
◆Both require @Semantics.amount.currencyCode annotation on the result
◆Key parameters for CURRENCY_CONVERSION:

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_CURCNV'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - Currency conversion and decimal shift'
define view ZPRAC_CDS_CURR_CONV
  as select from /dmo/travel
{
  key travel_id     as TravelId,
      currency_code as CurrencyCode,
      @Semantics.date: true
      begin_date    as BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      end_date      as EndDate,

  @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
  total_price       as TotalPriceDisplay,

  @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TargetCurrency'
  currency_conversion(
    amount            => total_price,
    source_currency   => currency_code,
    target_currency   => 'EUR',
    exchange_rate_date => begin_date,
    round             => 'X',
    decimal_shift     => 'X',
    decimal_shift_round => 'X',
    error_handling    => 'SET_TO_NULL'
  ) as TotalInEUR,

  'EUR' as TargetCurrency,

  @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
  decimal_shift(
    amount   => booking_fee,
    currency => currency_code
  ) as BookingFeeShifted,

  @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TargetCurrency'
  decimal_shift(
    amount   => total_price,
    currency => 'EUR'
  ) as TotalPriceEURShifted
}
details:
exchange rate table TCURR (or custom)

┌───────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────┐

│ Parameter │ Description │

├───────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────┤

│ amount │ Source amount to convert │

│ source_currency │ Original currency code │

│ target_currency │ Desired currency code │

│ exchange_rate_date│ Date for rate lookup │

│ round │ 'X' = round, ' ' = truncate │

│ decimal_shift │ 'X' = auto-shift, ' ' = no shift │

│ decimal_shift_round│ Round after shift ('X' / ' ') │

│ error_handling │ 'FAIL' / 'SET_TO_NULL' / 'KEEP' │

└───────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────┘

REQUIREMENTS:

- Exchange rates must exist in TCURR (or custom rate table)

- Currency must have configuration in TCUR* tables
